title: Give instructions: recipe
subtitle: Explain a simple process.
overview: Imperatives and sequence words help with instructions.
Use primero, luego, después, al final.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: In the end, serve the dish.

items.es: Luego, corta la cebolla y el tomate.
items.en: Then, cut the onion and the tomato.

items.es: Después, cocina todo durante diez minutos.
items.en: Afterward, cook everything for ten minutes.
Add salt, but not too much.

items.es: Al final, sirve la comida caliente.
items.en: In the end, serve the food hot.
